poisix 0.0.0.9006
  • Reference

poisix

A R package of functions to manipulate Date and POSIXct objects.

Installation 

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("poissonconsulting/poisix")

Contribution

Please report any issues.

Pull requests are always welcome.

Code of Conduct

Please note that the poisix project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
